text.title: Dormant Lead Reactivation Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for one reactivation sequence spec. Validator enforces segment, ≤3 touches, consent re-confirmation, prior-context references.

example.note: spec_id format wrong; missing contacts; body too short; references_prior_interaction false; owner "team"; version not semver.

list.item: EU/UK/CA contact + consent_age_months > 18 + touch 1 not is_consent_reconfirmation (rule consent-reconfirm-first-touch).
